profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences
profile.guestSubtitle: Log in or create an account to save homes and searches.
profile.signOutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to sign out?

privacyPage.zeroDataBody: We collect zero user data from our customers. We don't build a profile of who you are, and we never sell or share your information.
privacyPage.behaviorBody: We only track in-app behavior to improve your experience: which features are used and which are rarely used. We focus our effort on improving the features you actually use.
privacyPage.noResaleBody: We don't collect or redistribute your search filters and house preferences. What you look for stays private to you.
privacyPage.optOutDescription: Anonymous, cookieless stats that help us improve the app. Turn this off to stop sending them.

aboutPage.intro: Huismus helps you explore homes for sale across the Netherlands on a fast, map-first canvas — with rich neighborhood insights at your fingertips.
aboutPage.mission: Browse listings, compare neighborhoods with public statistics on residents, income and energy use, and check details like energy labels and foundation risk before you book a viewing.

search.q: How do I search for homes?
search.a: Search for a city or neighborhood from the map, then tap any marker to open its listing. Use Filters to narrow results by price, size, type and more.

stats.q: What do the neighborhood statistics show?
stats.a: Each area shows public figures on residents, households, income and energy use, so you can understand a neighborhood before you visit.

foundation.q: What is the foundation risk indicator?
foundation.a: For homes built before 1970 on certain soil types, we flag a possible foundation risk so you know to look into it further.

preferences.q: Can I change the language or theme?
preferences.a: Yes. Open Profile and use the Language and Appearance options under Preferences.

realtor.q: How do I contact the realtor?
realtor.a: Open a listing and tap “Visit realtor” to go to the original listing page with the realtor's details.

subscriptionPage.comingSoon: Subscription and payment methods coming soon.

privacyPolicyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicyPage.intro: Huismus (“we”, “us”) is an app and website for discovering homes for sale in the Netherlands on a map, with neighborhood insights based on public statistics. This policy explains what data we process, why, and what rights you have. It's written to match what the app actually does — not what's typical for similar apps.

shortVersion.title: The short version
shortVersion.body:
• We don't build a profile of you, and we never sell or rent your data to third parties.
• Your searches, favorites, recently viewed listings, and filter settings stay on your device — we don't send them to our servers.
• We only measure anonymous, cookie-free app usage to see which features get used. You can turn this off in Settings.
• If you create an account, we only store your email address and name to make that account work.

accountData.title: Account data
accountData.body:
If you sign in with Google or create an account with an email address, we receive and store your email address and (if available via Google) your name. This is needed to make your account work and to recognize you on your next visit. When signing in with an email address, your password is stored encrypted; we cannot read it in plain text.

Your session is secured with a temporary access token (JWT). On phones and tablets this token is kept in the operating system's secure keychain; on the web version it's kept in your browser's local storage, since a browser has no keychain.

deviceOnlyData.title: Data that stays on your device only
deviceOnlyData.body:
The following data is stored locally on your device (not sent to our servers), unless you explicitly opt into a feature that does:
• Favorited listings
• Recently viewed listings
• Search filters and preferences (e.g. price range, number of rooms, selected cities)
• Recent searches
• Language and appearance settings (light/dark)
• Whether you've already seen the intro tour
If we ever link this data to your account so it follows you to another device, we'll update this policy before that feature goes live.

analytics.title: Anonymous usage analytics
analytics.body: We measure anonymized, cookie-free app usage (e.g. which screens get visited) via a self-hosted analytics service (Plausible). These measurements contain no name, email address, stored IP address, or other personally identifiable data, and are never used to track or profile you individually. You can turn this off entirely in Settings → Privacy & security.

feedbackData.title: Feedback you send us
feedbackData.body: If you use the feedback form, we receive the message you type, and (so we can reproduce technical issues) your app version, platform (iOS/Android/web), and app language. We use this only to handle your feedback.

listingData.title: Listing data shown in the app
listingData.body: The property listings you see in Huismus come from public and/or third-party real estate sources. This is not data about you — it's information about homes and (where listed) the offering party. We don't guarantee this data is current, complete, or accurate; see also our Terms of Use.

neighborhoodStats.title: Neighborhood statistics
neighborhoodStats.body: The neighborhood insights in the app (e.g. about residents, income, or energy usage) are based on public, aggregated statistics from Statistics Netherlands (CBS) and similar public sources. These are statistics at the neighborhood or district level, not personal data about individual residents.

purposes.title: Why we process this data
purposes.body:
• Account data — Making your account work, recognizing you when you sign in — Performance of a contract
• Session token — Keeping you signed in, securing your account — Performance of a contract
• Anonymous usage analytics — Improving the app based on what's actually used — Legitimate interest
• Feedback message — Handling your question or report — Legitimate interest / performance of a contract
• Listing data, neighborhood statistics — The app's core function: showing and comparing homes — Performance of a contract

cookies.title: Cookies and similar technologies
cookies.body: The Huismus app doesn't use tracking cookies. Our usage analytics are cookie-free. The web version uses only technically necessary local storage (e.g. to keep you signed in) — no advertising or third-party tracking cookies.

sharing.title: Who we share data with
sharing.body:
• Hosting provider: our servers and database run with a hosting provider that acts solely as a processor and doesn't use data for its own purposes.
• Google: if you sign in with Google, Google processes the sign-in data needed to confirm your identity, under Google's own privacy policy.
• Our anonymous analytics run on infrastructure we manage ourselves — not shared with an external advertising or tracking party.
We don't work with ad networks, data brokers, or third-party tracking pixels.

transfers.title: Transfers outside the EEA
transfers.body: Wherever possible, we process and store data within the European Economic Area (EEA). Should a processor process data outside the EEA, we ensure appropriate safeguards, such as EU Standard Contractual Clauses.

retention.title: Retention periods
retention.body:
• Account data — For as long as your account exists; deleted after account deletion
• Session token — Until you sign out or the token expires
• Anonymous usage analytics — Aggregated, not traceable to an individual — no retention period applies
• Feedback message — As long as needed to handle your report, then deleted
• Data stored locally on your device — Until you uninstall the app or clear the data yourself

rights.title: Your rights

children.title: Children
children.body: Huismus is not directed at children under 16. We don't knowingly collect data from children under this age. If you believe we have, please contact us at support@huismusapp.com and we'll delete it.

security.title: Security
security.body: We take appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data, including encrypted data transmission (HTTPS/TLS), encrypted storage of passwords, and restricted access to personal data within our team. No method of data transmission or storage can be guaranteed 100% secure, however.

changes.title: Changes to this policy
changes.body: We may update this policy, for example when the app gains new features. For significant changes, we'll let you know via the app. The date at the top of this page shows when it was last updated.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body:
Questions about this policy or your data? Email support@huismusapp.com.

Fastvibes

termsOfUsePage.title: Terms of Use
termsOfUsePage.intro: These terms of use govern your use of the Huismus app and website (together, "the Service"), provided by Fastvibes ("we", "Huismus"). By using the Service, you agree to these terms. If you don't agree, please don't use the Service.

whatIsHuismus.title: What Huismus is
whatIsHuismus.body: Huismus is an app for searching and exploring homes for sale in the Netherlands in a map-driven way, with neighborhood insights based on public statistics (such as residents, income, and energy usage). Huismus displays listing data; Huismus is not a real estate agent, is not a party to any purchase or rental transaction, and does not provide advice about buying a home.

eligibility.title: Who can use the Service
eligibility.body: You must be at least 16 years old to create an account. When you create an account, you must provide accurate, current information and are responsible for keeping your login credentials confidential. If you notice unauthorized use of your account, report it immediately to support@huismusapp.com.

accountSecurity.title: Account and security
accountSecurity.body: You can sign in with Google or with an email address and password. You're responsible for all activity under your account. You can delete your account at any time via Settings; doing so also deletes the associated data, as described in our Privacy Policy.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use

listingDataDisclaimer.title: Listing data: no guarantee of accuracy
listingDataDisclaimer.body: The listing data in Huismus comes from public and/or third-party real estate sources. We don't guarantee that this data is accurate, complete, or current. A home's price, availability, and features may change after being shown in the app. Always verify important details with the offering party, agent, or an official source before making a decision. The same applies to neighborhood statistics: these are public, aggregated figures (including from Statistics Netherlands, CBS) that give a general indication, not a guarantee for any specific home or situation.

availability.title: Availability of the Service
availability.body: We try to keep the Service available as much as possible, but we don't guarantee uninterrupted access. We may temporarily suspend the Service for maintenance, or change, add, or discontinue features.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.body: Huismus is currently free to use. Should we introduce paid features in the future, we'll inform you and additional terms will apply before you agree to pay.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual property
intellectualProperty.body: All rights to the Huismus name, brand, app, and the underlying software and design belong to Fastvibes or our licensors. You're granted a personal, non-transferable license to use the app for its intended purpose. You may not copy, modify, decompile, or commercially (re)use the app or parts of it without our written permission.

liability.title: Liability
liability.body: The Service is provided "as is", without warranties. To the extent permitted by law, we're not liable for indirect damages, consequential damages, lost profits, or damages arising from decisions you make based on data in the app (including listing data and neighborhood statistics). Nothing in these terms limits liability for intent, gross negligence, or matters that cannot be excluded under Dutch law.

termination.title: Termination
termination.body: You can stop using the Service at any time by deleting your account. We may restrict or terminate your access if you violate these terms, or if we discontinue the Service — in the latter case, we'll inform you in advance wherever reasonably possible.

changes.title: Changes to these terms
changes.body: We may update these terms. For significant changes, we'll inform you via the app, with reasonable notice before the change takes effect. If you keep using the Service after that period, we'll treat that as acceptance of the new terms.

governingLaw.title: Governing law and disputes
governingLaw.body: These terms are governed by Dutch law. We'd prefer to resolve any dispute together first — contact us at support@huismusapp.com. If we can't resolve it, the Dutch courts have jurisdiction, unless mandatory consumer law says otherwise. As a consumer, you can also use the EU Online Dispute Resolution platform: ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr.

otherProvisions.title: Other provisions
otherProvisions.body: If any provision of these terms is found invalid, the remaining provisions stay in effect. Together with our Privacy Policy, these terms form the entire agreement between you and us regarding use of the Service.
